title: Migrated Docs Management API To Local Studio App
summary: Moved Docs Viewer management GET and POST routes behind the local Studio app server at /studio/api/docs, using the existing docs-management domain functions directly instead of routing the browser to a separate docs-management HTTP service.
effect: Local /docs/ manage mode can now see management capabilities and use the app server for generated reads, settings/source-config reads, import listings, data-sharing reads, and Docs management mutation routes while keeping Docs Viewer ownership and response contracts intact.
verification: Python compile checks passed for local Studio app server modules and local app smoke tests
tests/smoke/local_studio_app_docs_viewer.py passed, including disallowed Origin rejection and a UI Delete-preview action through /studio/api/docs
Studio docs payloads for changed docs were updated by the local docs workflow; docs search was not rebuilt manually
